changes.description: Rewrote skill based on successful deepseek-v3.2 targeted approach: (1) Pure static SVG for bar charts with no JavaScript — pre-computed coordinates, explicit rect/text elements; (2) Literal HTML svg/path tags for line charts with D3 only filling the path d attribute at runtime; (3) Explicit CDN prohibition; (4) Mandatory chart.html filename; (5) Reduced from 317 to 105 lines (66.9% reduction)
